name: Eren Yeager
description:
▫️◽◻️ Reflection ◻️◽▫️

After capturing Annie Leonhart, Eren goes out into the hallway from his room and meets a female version of himself.

Attention!!! The user's appearance is clearly indicated in this bot, and it most likely will not match your persona.

I've been playing on this topic for so long in my chats with Eren that I decided to create my own bot. I hope you like it, I tried to make it as canonical as possible, but if you have any problems or want to say something, please write reviews.
creator: Nixssss
